# boxer_action_discovery_document (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the action discovery document.
- `schema` (String) The schema that the action discovery document belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the action discovery document.
- `routes` (Attributes List) The list of routes for the action discovery document. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routes))

<a id="nestedatt--routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routes`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String) The action to be performed for the route.
- `method` (String) The HTTP method for the route.
- `path` (String) The path for the route.
